description: §45 clean neg — the valid single equality operator `==` (`if (a == b)`) SHALL NOT fire E-EQ-004. Same operands as `equality/strict-operator-reject`, but using scrml's canonical `==` instead of `===`. `notCodes` asserts E-EQ-004 stays silent.
rationale: §45: `==` (and `!=`) are the sanctioned equality operators; E-EQ-004 fires only on the invalid `===`/`!==` triple-equals forms.
